title: nf-core/crossmap pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

taxid.errorMessage: NCBI taxonomy ID must be provided as an integer

role.errorMessage: Role must be one of 'source', 'target', or 'both'

assembly.errorMessage: Assembly file must have extension '.fa', '.fna', '.fasta' (optionally gzipped) and cannot contain spaces

annotation.errorMessage: Annotation file must have extension '.gff', '.gff3', or '.gtf' (optionally gzipped) and cannot contain spaces
